channel.title: Anto Subash - deployment
channel.description: Full-stack developer passionate about web technologies, microservices, and modern software development.

item.title: Deploy ABP Framework dotnet core tiered app to docker swarm. Part 9
item.description: In this post we will see how to deploy your dotnet core app with docker container.

item.title: Extend Tenant management and add custom host to your ABP App. Part 7
item.description: In this post we will see how to extent the tenant entity and Add a custom tenant resolver for your ABP app.
